Checklist Item: INSTRUCTIONS: List every daily hospitality standard/checklist item the lodge should meet.
Category options: Neatness, Safety, Hospitality, Food & Beverage, Maintenance
These items will appear as a daily checklist for the lodge manager to tick off.
Reception area; clean and welcoming
All rooms; beds made and linen fresh
Corridors and stairwells; swept and lit
Bathrooms; sanitised and stocked with toiletries
Compound / parking area; swept and tidy
Fire extinguishers; inspected and accessible
Emergency exits; clearly marked and unobstructed
CCTV; operational and recording
Security guard; on duty and alert
First aid kit; stocked and accessible
Staff greeting guests warmly at check-in
Guest complaints; logged and addressed within 24h
Room service requests fulfilled promptly
Breakfast service; on time and well-presented
Kitchen hygiene; surfaces clean and food stored properly
Bar/drinks fridge; stocked and prices displayed
AC units; all functional
Plumbing; no leaks or blockages
Electrical; all lights and switches working
TV/WiFi; working in all rooms
